series_metadata.series_description: This record series covers postings to Social Media sites including, but not limited to, Facebook, GovDelivery, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter, and You-Tube. This information includes, but is not limited to, press releases, videos, events, and general information about the Ohio Department of Education. Social Media is made to market the agency and share information that is of interest to the citizens of Ohio. Information posted that falls under a separate retention schedule will be kept according to that retention schedule.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until updated or no longer of administrative value, then delete., Electronic: Delete
